      (((TopCat.Presheaf.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction CommRingCat
        G.hom.base).homEquiv _ _).symm G.hom.c) := by
  refine PresheafOfModules.Derivation'.mk
    (fun X =>

        (fun b =>

            (((Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (snd G G).left).hom.app X).hom b))
        (fun a b => by
          have h : (...).hom (a + b) = (...).hom a + (...).hom b :=
            RingHom.map_add _ _ _
          change (CommRingCat.KaehlerDifferential.D _).d _ = _
          rw [h]
          exact ModuleCat.Derivation.d_add _ _ _)
        (fun a b => by
          have h : (...).hom (a * b) = ... :=
            RingHom.map_mul _ _ _
          change (CommRingCat.KaehlerDifferential.D _).d _ = _
          rw [h]
          exact ModuleCat.Derivation.d_mul _ _ _)
        (fun _ => by sorry))  -- d_app sub-sorry (L580)
    (fun _ _ _ _ => by sorry)  -- d_map sub-sorry (L584)

  letI : IsIso (basechange_along_proj_two_inv G) := sorry

attempts.lean_error: Three concrete sub-sorries remain (compile clean — `lean_diagnostic_messages` returns 0 errors, only the expected `declaration uses sorry` warnings on the helper and main). attempts.goal_before: Scheme.relativeDifferentialsPresheaf (fst G G).left ≅ (PresheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (snd G G).left).hom).obj (Scheme.relativeDifferentialsPresheaf G.hom)
attempts.goal_after: Body is now a substantive Route (b) skeleton: forward iso obtained via `(asIso inv).symm` after `letI : IsIso inv := sorry`. The 3 remaining sub-sorries are: (i) `d_app` of the inner derivation (`KaehlerDifferential.D` of `(ψ.app X) ∘ (φ_G.app X)` vanishes by factorisation through source presheaf); (ii) `d_map` (cross-open naturality of the pointwise derivations); (iii) `IsIso` of the constructed inverse map.
attempts.insight: PARTIAL ceiling honored with substantive body cut (per progress-critic-iter138 watch-flag (ii) — helper-only without body cut is forbidden). The Route (b) skeleton landed substantively: the additive (`d_add`) and Leibniz (`d_mul`) laws closed on the pointwise `KaehlerDifferential.D` derivation; only the d_app + d_map sub-goals + IsIso of the inverse remain. Three concrete sub-sorries each strictly smaller than the original ~360-710 LOC closure envelope. **Negative finding (codified into debug feedback)**: `simp` with `map_add`/`map_mul`/`ModuleCat.Derivation.d_add` does NOT fire inside `Derivation.mk`-produced goals — the function passed to `Derivation.mk` appears as a beta-redex in the goal, and `simp` does not beta-reduce through the lambda. The working pattern: extract the addition/multiplication identity into a separate `have h`, `change` to reshape, `rw [h]`, then `exact` the explicit derivation law. This is reusable for any future `ModuleCat.Derivation.mk` / `PresheafOfModules.Derivation'.mk` construction.

(Priority 3) close `IsIso (basechange_along_proj_two_inv G)` at L624 via either (a) Route (a) chart-unfolding-helper + forward direction or (b) Route (b'2) local-iso via `PresheafOfModules.toPresheaf` + `NatTrans.isIso_iff_isIso_app` reducing to per-open ModuleCat morphisms identified with `KaehlerDifferential.tensorKaehlerEquiv`'s inverse on affines (~150-300 LOC).
